rationale: Educ. Code §38.027 governs school district electronic communication policies between employees and students. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A school district shall adopt a written policy concerning electronic communications between a school employee and a student enrolled in the district.
_note: No conflict exists; the cited rule addresses an unrelated subject matter (school district electronic communication policies) and contains no provisions touching on homestead exemptions, property tax appraisal, or Tax Code §11.13(b).
